title: Pearlescent Frogtimiz
description: Pearlescent Frogtimiz - is a minecraft 2??? Okay, nope. Its just a really cool modpack
body:
> Pearlescent Frogtimiz - is a modpack that adds new biomes, new mobs, new structures, new music, updated textures, updated mechanics and new ones, updated old dimension and new ones. And much more!

![text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41b2112d5dd904846e507c4bbcf2d55891f13d53.png)

- New structures!

![New structures!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fdd1c86c0998851402eef317f0bc5aba71eeecaa_0.webp)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
- New biomes!

![New biomes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a43d42b55b29527dfb307ae37057d981e972b4a6_0.webp)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Mob vote losers!

![New mobs!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cb5d031d853da27533b77bd84a8617d58a82434_0.webp)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Updated Textures! (Disabled by default) (Recommend to not enable, if your computer is potato)

![Updated textures!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c82c2f17153cfa10b8448583ad41b07605fae06_0.webp)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Updated and New villages!

![Jungle Village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de094e6f8098ae242681bd6e7d3a20bfb1a5a5dd_0.webp)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Islands in the sky!

![Sky Structure!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/782a368c659c5b8dca1f765893bfb49ac5b32b42_0.webp)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- New beach stuff!

![Beaches update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43a172bb2f9529712f7f31aa274e60cc8ce31aa8_0.webp)



_The modpack have 2 shaders: Complementary and Miniature. If you have low device, its better to turn off shaders, or you can use miniature shader, because of its low._

> This modpack uses Vanilla Tweaks Resource Pack, there you can create your own resource pack [https://vanillatweaks.net/](https://vanillatweaks.net/)



-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
